item.title: Brad Karp’s Paul Weiss Reign Ends With An Epstein-File Plot Twist
item.description: Karp is out as chair, but the Epstein file hits keep on coming.

item.title: Anthropic’s Legal Plug In: Hate to Say We Told You So, But We Told You So
item.description: Buckle up. We could be in for a wild ride.

item.title: Eikon Therapeutics Continues the IPO Parade, Raising $381M for Cancer Drug Clinical Trials
item.description: Eikon’s stock market debut builds on growing IPO momentum, following upsized offerings from Aktis Oncology and Veradermics.

item.title: Law Firm Collecting Cash From Ghislaine Maxwell, Epstein Files Show
item.description: The legal connections continue to mount.

item.title: The Digital Health M&A Wave Is Finally Here
item.description: Digital health is entering a more mature phase in 2026 as consolidation accelerates through targeted M&A, driven by the need for scale, artificial int...
